## Epic

Integration

## Description

- Create typed mock service layer for auth, portfolio, strategy, and tx flows
- Centralize error handling and simulated latency/failure cases
- Provide a clear adapter pattern for future backend integration

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Typed mock service utilities in place
- [ ] Shared error model across pages
- [ ] Simulated retry/failure flows implemented
- [ ] Adapter contract documented for future backend integration
